subcodes.first_line: Your book hath attained unto the Most Exalted Horizon, and the Lord of Names calleth unto thee, as a grace from Him, that thou mayest be of [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد تشرف کتابک بالافق الاعلی و ینادیک مالک الاسماء فضلا من عنده لتکون من
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for nearness to God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
